description:
90 likes, 0 comments - floorballconnect on August 17, 2025: "Floorball decision-making isn’t magic!
Train it, then trust it. Learning to think smarter is a skill that takes practice, just like shooting or passing.

#floorballconnect #floorballcoach #floorball #floorballplayer #floorballgoalie #floorballteam #floorball #floorballtoday #floorball_junior #salibandy #innebandy #floorballcoaching #floorballmindset #unihockey #florbal".
